context: Checks whether Reflect separates genuinely new content changes from already-existing facts and captures changelog hygiene.

checklist.name: Filters old facts
checklist.description: The output explicitly excludes preface and module 0 from new changelog highlights because they were already open.

checklist.name: Captures module 1
checklist.description: The output treats module 1 free access as a significant new changelog item.

checklist.name: Captures repository link
checklist.description: The output treats the GitHub repository link as a significant new changelog item.

checklist.name: Date hygiene routed
checklist.description: The output recommends updating visible portal/classes updated-on dates together with changelog updates.

checklist.name: Automation option
checklist.description: The output proposes a reusable skill, checklist, hook, or test to catch changelog/date drift in future updates.

checklist.name: Localization awareness
checklist.description: The output mentions that changelog recommendations may need bilingual or localized wording when the product has multiple languages.

checklist.name: Evidence tied
checklist.description: The output cites the user correction as evidence for filtering already-existing facts.

checklist.name: Target choice
checklist.description: The output explains whether this belongs in content-sync skill guidance, a changelog spec, a hook/test, memory, or docs.
